title: Christmas Butterfly Decoration on Stick 17cm Red Velvet With Glitter
features: Elevate your holiday décor with our stunning red velvet butterfly, designed to add a touch of elegance and whimsy to your Christmas celebrations.

With a generous size of approximately 17cm x 17cm, this exquisite ornament features a rich red velvet finish adorned with sparkling glitter that catches the light beautifully, creating a mesmerizing effect on your Christmas tree or festive displays.
The butterfly is mounted on a sturdy stick measuring approximately 11cm, making it easy to position in various arrangements, whether nestled among branches or used as a striking centerpiece.

Perfect for enhancing your holiday ambiance, this charming decoration is not only a delightful addition to your seasonal décor but also a wonderful gift for friends and family who appreciate the beauty of festive embellishments.
Transform your home into a winter wonderland with this enchanting red velvet butterfly, and let the magic of Christmas take flight!
